questionHtml: The temperature of the sample is increased without a change in pressure. Outline the effect it has on the density of the gas.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

The average translational speed increases «because T increases» ✓

From P=13ρv2, the density decreases «to keep P constant»  ✓ 


ALTERNATIVE 2

From the ideal gas law, the volume of the gas increases ✓

Since ρ=mv and m is constant, the density decreases  ✓
